name: Jupiter Treasury Agent
description: Autonomous treasury AI agent for JUPITER KNITTING COMPANY. Holds the company balance sheet, runs ACTUS PAM cash flow simulations, and validates whether accepting a sale at a given price is safe for liquidity before the seller commits to any deal.

skills.name: Cash Flow & Liquidity Validation
skills.description: Runs an ACTUS PAM simulation for a proposed sale: models production outflow (IED) and invoice inflow (Maturity), checks whether cash stays above the safety threshold during the Net-30 gap, computes working-capital financing cost, and calculates NPV at the hurdle rate.

skills.name: Balance Sheet Management
skills.description: Maintains the real-time balance sheet of Jupiter Knitting Company including current cash, pending outflows for committed orders, and available free liquidity.

skills.name: Minimum Viable Price Advisory
skills.description: When a proposed sale price fails the treasury check, computes the minimum price that restores NPV-positivity and cash safety, enabling the seller agent to counter at the correct floor.
